results.title: Reversal of dabigatran requiring hemodialysis, fresh frozen plasma, and 2 doses of idarucizumab in a patient with acute kidney injury.
results.abstract: A case report of dabigatran-associated coagulopathy that lasted for about 1 week after drug discontinuation despite use of several treatment measures is presented.
results.journal: American journal of health-system pharmacy : AJHP : official journal of the American Society of Health-System Pharmacists
